summary_text: As of 2026-04-02 18:03 UTC, the recent Canada earthquake dataset contains 564 events from the current rolling window. In the last 24 hours, 13 events were recorded, including 0 in the last hour. The largest event in the last 24 hours was M4.5 at Industry-related event, 11 km WNW of Sturgeon County, AB, felt/Événement lié à l'industrie, 11 km ONO de Sturgeon County, AB, ressenti. The deepest event reached 18.45 km at 61 km S of Daajing Giids, BC/61 km S de Daajing Giids, BC. The most recent listed event was M1.36 at Blast, 1 km E of Wickham, NB/Dynamitage, 1 km E de Wickham, NB at 2026-04-02T16:00:17.000Z. There were 3 events of magnitude 3 or greater and 1 of magnitude 4 or greater in the last 24 hours. The most active regions were BC (3) and AB (3).
